name: pixel-paragraph-words
description: Paragraph where specific words render in an interactive pixel font that swaps or cycles on hover

registry_item.name: pixel-paragraph-words
registry_item.description: Paragraph where specific words render in an interactive pixel font that swaps or cycles on hover

visual_summary: A paragraph component that uses a pixel font for specific words, with the option to choose the pixel font style and add custom classes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready paragraph component with the following characteristics:

Name: pixel-paragraph-words
Description: A paragraph component that uses a pixel font for specific words, with the option to choose the pixel font style and add custom classes.
Style: geist, tailwind, css
Interactions: 
Tags: paragraph, text, pixel, font

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// registry/default/ui/pixel-paragraph-words.tsx
/**
 * @module PixelParagraph
 *
 * Renders a paragraph where specific words / phrases use a pixel font
 * while the rest of the text stays in the normal font.
 *
 * Setup — Geist Pixel Fonts with Tailwind CSS
 * =============================================
 *
 * All Geist fonts can be used through CSS variables:
 *
 *   GeistSans:          --font-geist-sans
 *   GeistMono:          --font-geist-mono
 *   GeistPixelSquare:   --font-geist-pixel-sq
